1.content:
You (Mike) felt great to be in charge of your two younger brothers, Paul and Tyler for the next week, our father Joe has finally decided that you were old enough to take care of your younger brothers.

You had argued for the last two years with your father that you could watch both of the boys but dad didn't have any question that you were old enough, it was ... well ... that you were not big enough, Being a midget was a very challenging life but you were determined to prove to your father that you COULD watch both boys and everything would go smoothly.

Father was all packed and ready as all three of you were standing at the front door saying your goodbyes, You hug your father and tell him not to worry about anything and have a great relaxing vacation, then Paul kissed dad on the cheek saying that he will miss him but he would be alright with his big brother Mike watching him (with his fingers crossed behind his back) and then Tyler threw his arms around dads waist and smashed his face in dads crotch saying he wanted to go with him but he knew that Mike would play with him a lot while dad is gone, as Joe bent down to give Ty a hug, Ty kissed him on the lips and then turned bright red and ran back upstairs to his room that he shares with Paul.

AS we all waved goodbye to dad pulling out of the driveway and down the street and then out of sight, Ty rushed over to you and said he wanted you to play with him as Paul went back upstairs where he shared a room with Ty and closed the bedroom door.

What is Mike's (Your) first decision to make ???

11.content:
After watching dad pull away from the house, you first thought that you would go upstairs to your brother's room and talk to them.

As you got to their door, it was slightly cracked open, so you stood there and listened, it shocked you at what you were hearing ... " come on Paul, play with me... please... now that dad is gone we can play any way that you want to, I will even drink you homemade protein drinks if you play with me ... PLEASE PAUL PLAY WITH ME " .

I smiled at Ty begging his brother to play with him, he probably want's to play board games or games on the playststion or the WII, but then I heard Paul saying " Look Ty, I do like to play with you but you are too small, but you can still play with me if you want to ".

I was a bit confused at what Paul was saying to Ty and then I heard Ty saying, " Okay Paul, I will play with you, I would like to play find the one eyed monster again ... okay ?" Paul smiled to himself and scooted his chair back allowing Ty to slip under his desk and scooted back up to the desk, " Okay brother, you play and I will convince Mike to let you have a friend over for the night and then you both can play all you want".

I thought to myself, what is going on in there and opened the door and walked inside " HEY GUYS, What's up ?" looking around I didn't see Ty so I looked at Paul and asked " where did Ty go Paul, I thought he was up here with you , do you know where he is " Paul doesn't move from his desk and replied, "I think he might have went outside to play or maybe over to his friiend's house for a while" Looking down at Paul's feet I can see one of Ty's socks barely sticking out and it was slightly moving back and forth, " okay well tell him that I thought he could bring one of his friends over for the day if he wanted".

I knew Paul was not telling me the truth, so I ........

13.content:
Yelling upstairs at your brothers " HEY GUYS I AM GOING TO START BREAKFAST NOW" as you walk in the kitchen and grab the eggs and bacon out of the fridge. Soon you hear someone running down the stairs, within seconds Ty was in the kitchen with me, : Hey Mike, can I help you cook breakfast ?" I chuckled to myself and just said " Buddy you can help me with whatever you want" and then told him to bring over a kitchen chair for me to stand on while I cook breakfast.

Ty was so excited to help me that he was more in the way than helping me but I didn't care about that, if it gives him pleasure helping me then it's all worth it. I was suprised though when I heard Ty asking me " hey Mike when we are done eating could I shower with you today ?"

That question took me off guard and I stuttered a bit " A.. A .. SHOWER, T..ty why would you ask me that ?" and Ty's reply was " well we havent done that for a long time, since we were real little... remember Mike ? and I kind of missed it and with dad gone now, we can do whatever we want ... right Mike ?"

131.content:
“Well buddy, let me think about okay ? “ as I ruffled up his hair.

“Come on Please Mike... PLEASE ...”

“I said I will think about it Ty, where did this idea even come from buddy, I mean I wouldn’t have even thought about that, so how come you did ? I am not mad or anything, I just didn’t expect that question”.

Ty looks at me with a red face and half looking away from me when he said “. I just miss being close to you Mike, I mean my friend Sam does almost everything with his older brother and I wanted that to be us again, even showering together again”.

Now I kind of felt bad for him, I never knew that he missed me that much, we live together but he has a point, we really don’t do anything together anymore... but taking a shower ?

14.content:
First thing you thought that you should do was to get a shower and start the day, as you passed your brothers room that they share, you opened the door and told them " hey guys, I am going to jump in the shower and after I will make us breakfast" and you closed the door.

Stepping into the shower, you slowly clean your small body, you thought that you should get out quick and start breakfast, but when you stuck your head in your brothers room and told them you were getting a shower, Paul got a nasty idea and shared it with Ty.

Now fully cleaned, you shut off the shower and pull back the shower curtain to grab your towel that you placed on the toilet lid, but instead you see Paul standing at the toilet with his dick in his hands looking at your small frame, " WHAT ARE YOU DOING IN HERE PAUL " you shout, only to get a reply back, " HEY STOP YELLING AT ME MIKE, I had to pee and now I can't go because you shouted at me" as Paul took the extra few steps to be standing directly in front of me with his dick still in his hands.

Frozen in place, I just stare at his dick as it gets bigger, with him shaking it up and down so close to my face that I can smell it, I then began sprouting my own but keep it hidden behind the curtain, finally Paul speaks .......

info.brief_description: You are Mike, the oldest of three brothers and yes you are a midget ....
info.description:
PLEASE ADD CHAPTERS AND HELP MAKE THIS A GREAT STORY TO ENJOY !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!


You are Mike, the oldest of three brothers and yes you are a midget (17), you stand at 3 ft tall while you younger brother Paul (13) stands at 5 foot and 3 inches inches and your youngest brother Tyler who stands at (10) stands at 4 foot and 4 inches.

Your single parent Father Joe is going on vacation for a week and you are to be watching both your brothers, it will be challenging because they don't like to listen to you most of the time and being the oldest and smallest, they sometimes tease you , okay they tease you a lot in everyway ( words, attitude, body (your & theirs) .

This story will be about how well Mike will be able to watch his two brothers and what will happen when they misbehave.

You may introduce cousins and some of all three boys school friends, this is going to be an ALL MALE STORY, feel free to have the two brothers use Mike in any many ways.

No Vore or Gore, No toilet related stuff, no diapers or shrinking or growing.

Will the two younger brothers, end up seducing Mike or just controlling him in various ways, Father Joe may video call from time to time.
